title: Steganography Technique for Data Security
author: Kshitija S. Sawant
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In today’s word it is very important to send the private information. Safely the rapid development of data transfer made it easier to send data faster to the destination. This paper includes the method of stenography through which we can transfer the data safely, the steps of image stenography and literature survey.
